word: G4038 - πέριξ - périx - per'-ix - Round about

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
round about: the cities round about, the circumjacent cities
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Adverb from G4012; all around, that is, (as adjective) circumjacent: - round about.
